summary:
MINISTRY EVALUATION AND REFLECTIONS: Brandon discusses a personal process of seeking guidance and evaluating his yearly goals, framing his spiritual work as being directed by the Lord as he reviews his productivity.

VISIONS OF NATURAL DISASTERS AND PLAGUES: Brandon recounts experiencing visions of a sudden, violent volcanic eruption on an island near Cuba that forces inhabitants into the sea. He also describes a separate scene in Guatemala involving a green snake, a gravesite marked with a makeshift cross, a tattered King James Bible, and the spread of plagues across islands.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND CONFLICTS: Brandon outlines his claims regarding international developments, including the removal of the Venezuelan government, oil rigs catching fire, and the installation of a proxy leadership. He further mentions seeing a hazard symbol on a drum near Cuba, a hypnotic wheel associated with the CIA spinning over America, and expresses concerns regarding political events in Canada and Australia.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon details an impending coordinated attacks targeting major public gatherings and landmarks. He lists locations such as Times Square on New Year's Eve, Bourbon Street in New Orleans, Miami, Rodeo Drive in Los Angeles, the Rose Bowl, the Sugar Bowl, Reno, and a major Mormon temple in Salt Lake City. He specifically describes armed individuals in trench coats casing these areas and mentions targets like Warner Brothers and Six Flags.

EUROPEAN AND GLOBAL FORECASTS: Brandon states he envisioned threats directed at the Vatican and other locations in Europe. His account includes mentions of political figures, men in tactical attire, a black swan swimming near the Eiffel Tower, and future geopolitical shifts involving Israel, Damascus, and a desire to rebuild an old Soviet empire.

ECONOMIC OUTLOOK AND TIMELINE: Brandon projects a period of intense global turbulence accelerating through the years 2026 to 2028. He shares specific economic predictions, including a transparent housing market, a targeted interest rate of two percent, and crypto market movements.
rawData: [December 18, 2025]-[Praying over attacks major alert from the Holy Spirit]-[https://youtu.be/bvxPloP7Nys]-[Well, good evening family. Thank you for joining us. I know it's late, but I thought we'll pray for a little bit. I won't talk a lot. I'm going to do my best here. We're going to just jump right into this, okay? And so, we're going to just pray. I told Diana I'm not going to jab her here. She's trying to get all the Bibles out. There's so many of you getting born again and it's taken her a long time to get all these Bibles sent out to everybody. And so she said, "Brandon, I'm behind. I got to get these Bibles out." So, I said, "Well, you pray with me just a little bit and then send the Bibles out to the people." So, we're so excited. There's so many people getting born again on this channel. I'm not complaining, but it is extra, you know. So, God is so good. A lot of behind-the-scenes work, and we're so grateful for every single one of you that are getting born again and coming on here. Thank you for being patient with us as we try to get your Bibles to you as quickly as possible. Well, we went over a lot of things that the Lord had for us yesterday. I had a little bit of what the Lord was showing me yesterday and I talked to you all about it, about being intimate with the Father and growing in intimacy. It's so important. As Diana and I were driving around today doing our tasks, our conversations were deep. I reflect because I draw so much from her as my friend and just talking about where we are with the Lord. And I want to tell you this, when I talk about the thermostat and what we're believing for and how you evaluate your year, I'm not talking about just a normal occurrence. We check ourselves every day with the Father. But there's something about when we started doing YouTube and when the Lord said, "You work for me now. You no longer work for yourself. You work for me now. You answer to me now concerning these things." He came to us like a boss. And it was not a normal conversation the day he showed up like that. Ever since then, he talks about finances; he talks about a lot of things. But every year since we've been doing this, he evaluates how we've done ministry for him and the level of what the world would call success or achievement—no, not the achievement. Come on, Brandon. The level of your productivity. How productive have you been for the Father? And that's why when he comes in that timeframe, it's usually at the end of the year and says, "Well, I want to give you your report card." And that's why I was going over something that was very private with me yesterday. And people said, "Well, Brandon, don't you evaluate yourself all throughout the year every day?" Yes. Let the elevator go to the top, Sister Clipboard. Yes, of course I evaluate myself every day. I'm talking about something very intimate where the Father comes and visits; it's not the average visitation. So if you've never experienced that, probably you haven't. Most haven't. So I'm not trying to be arrogant about it. I'm just being real and transparent. People can see ministry. The Lord is a commander-in-chief. It is amazing. He is the boss, the CEO of your ministry. He's the Great I Am. And it's not like answering to yourself while doing your eBay and Poshmark or being a Walmart manager. This is big business to him. Not business—that's a bad word—big ministry. It is business to the Lord. I mean, you're working for him. It's not a job. It's like Paisley said, "You have the greatest job ever, Daddy. You get to pray and talk to Jesus." And I said, "Yeah, that's a cool way to look at it." I don't look at it as a job, but like what she was saying, "Daddy, you do the coolest thing ever. You get to talk to Jesus for the people and tell them what he says." I never looked at it through a child's eyes, but I stopped and I looked at it and I was like, "You know what? You're right." You get to hear things and you get to pray with the people. And as Jesus tells us what's coming, I'm so grateful that he visits. Looking through a child's lens, where you pray with the people, it's just interesting, isn't it? She has a different spin on things as a kid. As she's in there praying and doing her thing and taking her notes and comes out, I just love a child's faith and the heart of a child. But let's go over... I'm getting hot. I was trying to look nice by wearing a jacket, but I get hot because I'm hot in nature. I can run the air conditioner in the winter, but I think it's because I have so much extra stuff. Not for long. I'm like a polar bear. It's warm. My body heats up in there like a furnace always hot. Oh, sorry. Did I knock it off? Her phone. Okay, got it. So, we're going to go over what we saw yesterday and what the Lord revealed to us. I'm going to tell you details because last night I was already getting tired, so I didn't. But I'll go over it real quick. Five minutes into this. Where does that time go? The island that I saw was by Cuba. This island had a volcano on it, but it was dormant. It was a volcano that people were not expecting to go off. It was an island volcano that people had forgotten about. And as this volcano erupted, it was so violent and so unexpected that the people on the island couldn't flee. They were being shoved into the sea. And I saw lava that was red coming down the mountain. It was burning up the trees and everything. And as it was coming into the water, it was steaming. I saw steam like vapor from this volcanic eruption that looked like something out of a fog, but it was on all sides. I remember the north side of the island was the worst in the vision, and it was toward the United States. And as this was coming in there, the lava was thick, like tall lava. It was not just a little bit of lava; it was a lot. And it was a mass... like would it be Pompeii? Yeah, like that. Remember back in the day, a thousand years ago, whatever? It was like a huge eruption. As I could see that, that was one of the parts of the things I could see, and I thought that was a very interesting thing. Now people are trying to guess the island. It looked small to me because I saw the side of it. Brandon, I haven't had time to look through it today because there's so many other things that are pressing concerning spiritual matters other than this. The other part was Guatemala, and I saw some kind of event where the people were like bush people. The way I can only describe this, they were living off the land. I saw them drinking water from a makeshift cistern made out of wood that they had carved out that was catching the rainwater off the trees. They were drinking this water. But I saw a green snake. And I don't know what this green snake represents, but it was a dangerous snake. But I saw people that were buried in the middle of a trail, a path that was worn down from people walking on it in the jungle. But this cross that they had made out of—I don't want to mix these up. Was this on the island, son? I think so. Yeah. Okay. I got to reverse that. Sorry. The cross that I saw was made on the island, but there was something wrong because I could see banana leaves that were trying to outline this cross that was tied together with some kind of string, jungle vines, and I saw the lump of dirt where I thought maybe it might have been a pet that was buried, you know, because you don't want to always add to or take away from anything in the vision because I thought, 'Is this a human grave or is this person grieving over like a dog that died or maybe a horse?' I don't know; it was a big grave. But she had her Bible out that looked like an old King James tattered Bible that was very precious to her, but it had Holy Bible on the front like an old King James like 1900s, you know, early—like old, but it was tattered. You know how the leather will split and be worn on the corners? Yeah. Kind of like ours where it's all falling apart. But hers was torn on the sides, too. And so this Bible had 'Holy Bible' on the front that was gold, like old-looking letters that were printed on the front of it. But it was a black Bible and the edges were all worn out. And they were sitting on some kind of rock holding this Bible, but it wasn't open. It was shut and they were looking at the mound of dirt, and I thought, 'What am I praying into?' But then I was hearing about the plague and I started seeing about the plague. This is about the plague. It was something else about the plague spreading throughout the islands and things. And then I saw Guatemala and that's whenever I saw again there was something really wrong. I felt something bad, something was happening. I went to one of his meetings once and he's a missionary down in that area from what I understand and I saw Mozambique, Heidi, and I saw these ministers that were ministering to people that were like bush people that don't live in the city. They live off the land there. This was very like barefoot, no shoes. And so as I was praying into that, I felt danger. There was something very serious concerning this. And then Braden, what else did the Lord show? You saw Heidi and then you saw... I saw that. And then you saw the hazard. Oh, I saw the spinning from the CIA. That was a hypnotic wheel. The hypnotic wheel was spinning black and yellow. And as it was spinning, the Lord said, 'I'm taking you back to the hypnotic wheel. Look at this.' And it was spinning over America. Spinning over America. As I was looking at Cuba and I saw the symbol again for a nuclear, biological, whatever it is, it was a black and yellow hazard on a black 50-gallon drum-looking thing. And I thought that was interesting. But I have such a caution, and as we have prayed over Venezuela, praying over Maduro—yeah, Maduro—and what the Venezuelan government's going to do. I pray we don't. I think that'd be terrible to have another war. But as I saw this happening, I saw liberation coming for the Venezuelan people. And I saw revival on the heels of the overthrowing of this dictator, of this regime or whatever you want to call it through the drug lords and a cleaning of a slate. And so, you know, I'm not saying we did a really great job or our troops did the best they could with what they were given for Iraq. Iraq's still not liberated as far as the way the people are. They still have a crooked government with Maliki. Maliki was the head of the Iraq government. He was just as bad as Saddam was. So, you know, all I know is I see these things. And that's what we do. I told her, "You know what? Sometimes we don't hit that. After we open it up, we're kind of disappointed; we look at it and it didn't fully manifest what we were looking for." I said, "But God, do it this year!" I'm not worried that it didn't happen like we thought it would. Sometimes you may even have a little bit of a setback, but God is still good. Regardless of how you feel—that maybe you're not as far along as you should be, and maybe you've even taken a couple of steps back—God is a restorer of what the enemy ate. I believe that what the devil meant for bad, God will turn it around for good in your favor if you just don't let go. We write those visions down and I told her, "Let's believe God." So we take communion over it, seal it, and put it away. I said we won't touch it again until the last day of the year, and we'll see what God does. One year we put a house on there. We put it down for 20 years. It kept going year after year after year, and then the Lord came through. It wasn't when we expected. We wanted it every single time; we wanted it all the time, but we just kept recycling it. We put it on for the next year and rolled it over every year. I wasn't like, "That didn't happen again." The desire didn't go away. No, we believe God. Then God provided and got us another house. But God is always able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that you ask or think. So, I'm trying to encourage you all again as we come to the end, before we open our envelope of what we believe God for in 2025. What is 2025 in review for your spiritual walk? Are you walking where you wanted to walk? Is your marriage where you wanted your marriage to be? Are your kids where you wanted them to be with the Lord? I'm very specific about everything I write on that piece of paper for what we're believing God for in 2026 now, having it in there and meditating on it. I'm believing God to give this amount of money away. I want to help with this amount of money as a ministry. I don't want to just hoard it for myself for Brandon Biggs to have a lot; I want to be able to help the Kingdom of God and promote the Gospel throughout the whole world. I believe with all my heart that as we preach to the nations as a witness unto Him, then the end will come. I believe with all my heart that's what we should do, so that's what we believe for. Let's stretch ourselves to believe to give more than we've ever given before and to reap more than we've ever reaped because it's all law. Most people don't want to talk about that part. So, write your vision down, make it plain, and believe God for big things in 2026. Believe God for your supernatural abundance in your marriage, your kids coming home, finances, a vacation, or a new car—whatever you're believing for. But souls—how many people are you going to reach in 2026? I want to come across—well, on our channel and in public—how many I could reach. You know, like five or six hundred people? If you put that on there, it's overkill, you know? For some of you that's a lot, but just say, "Hey, I'm not going to leave 2026 without leading at least one person to Jesus." If every single one of us led one person to Jesus—let me ask you that. Out of all the people on here right now, did you at least win one soul to Jesus this year? Can you evaluate yourself and ask, "Did I at least pray for one person to come to Christ this year?" I can tell you a lot of you can't say that. That's a hard thing to say. We should be able to say that as a believer. Did you at least win one soul to Christ this year? Did you win five? Did you at least win five souls witnessing? Did you pray for at least a couple of people to get healed? They may not have gotten healed, but at least you put your faith out there to do it. When you get to the beginning of 2027, you'll say, "Lord, everything I put on that list came to pass and more." I believe and receive all that You have for me, that this will be an abundant year, a bountiful overflow year. We walk in abundance to the extreme, until it overflows with healing and wholeness and wellness, Father. From any incurable disease, we're delivered. We need to believe for the overflow for this year. I believe it, Father. I believe it, Lord. Do you believe it? This year's not over. Don't give up on this one yet. I hear it inside: why give up on this one? This is not over yet. God can turn it in a day. Everything can turn in a 24-hour period like he's always talking about. I'm believing, Father, for cryptos to go up like a rocket. "To the moon" is what they all say. To the moon, baby. Like those YouTubers say, "To the moon." It's a wonderful life. "Let me lasso it and pull it down for you. I'll give you the moon." Remember that guy? "It's a Wonderful Life." Buffalo Bill, won't you come out tonight? Won't you come out tonight and dance by the light of the moon? I'll lasso the moon for you, George Bailey. I love that. Father, I thank you for good memories. I thank you for memories in 2025 and 2026. Father, there's not a bad year. You look back and review and go, "Look at what God has done." Some people have been through it this year, but God, we have tomorrow and we're believing for tomorrow. We're believing for the now. God, there's a turnaround in people's lives so that when they look back at 2026, they're going to say, "This was the best year I've ever had." Thank you, Lord, that you have great things in store this year. And we take this body, Father, and we're believing that there's supernatural healing. We make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We thank you, Lord, that you forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. If you have drama in your families, that's what I pray: that we have peace that passes all understanding. For the Lord is good and his mercy endures forever. In him there is no darkness.
